infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SakeScan uses the camera to capture photos inside the app before you publish them.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SakeScan uses the microphone to record audio clips that stay with your in-app creations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SakeScan accesses your photo library to let you choose media that appears in the app.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SakeScan uses your location to show nearby stores that carry sake.
